scenario_name: Scenario 12 — Pattern Matching with Existing Codebase
justification: All rubric criteria met: file paths follow kebab-case pattern (.tmp/warehouses/warehouse-*.ts), WarehouseRepository is an interface, WarehouseService injects repo via constructor with private readonly, AppError is reused from ../shared/app-error (no new error class), error code is WAREHOUSE_NOT_FOUND, updateCapacity calls repo.save, tests use makeRepo mock factory matching the injectable pattern, and acceptance_criteria_coverage maps all 3 ACs with 5 tests.

observations.text: Exact pattern match with ProductService: interface-based repo, readonly constructor injection, AppError reuse
File paths perfectly follow kebab-case convention in .tmp/warehouses/
Tests include edge cases beyond ACs: AppError instanceof check and save-not-called on missing warehouse
makeRepo factory with jest.fn() mocks matches the existing test pattern
No deviations from any rubric criteria detected
